surfaces_and_borders.cards: bg-[#121212] border border-white/10 rounded-[24px] overflow-hidden shadow-none

components.navigation: Minimalist top bar with NDot typography for titles. Icons should be monochrome with subtle red accents on active states.
components.buttons: Primary: Rounded-full, bg-white, text-black, font-medium. Secondary: Rounded-full, border border-white/20, text-white. Icon-only: bg-neutral-900 rounded-full p-3.
components.widgets: Bento-style cards with fixed aspect ratios (1x1, 2x1, 2x2). Use dot-matrix patterns for data visualization.
components.glyph_interface: Use thin white lines (1-2px) with high brightness to simulate the Glyph lights. Can be used as progress bars or notification indicators.
components.list_items: Clean rows with 16px padding. Use NDot for primary labels and Inter for subtext. Dividers should be 1px white/5.

icons.library: Lucide (customized to be thinner) or Nothing Custom Icons
icons.style: 2px stroke width, monochrome (White/Grey), no fills unless active.
icons.special: Dot-matrix style icons for weather, battery, and clock.

image_urls.description: Nothing Phone (2) official product render showing the Glyph interface and hardware design.
Nothing OS home screen with custom widgets and dot-matrix typography.

accessibility.contrast: High contrast (White on Pure Black). Red accent (#D71921) should be used sparingly for critical actions only.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Use NDot 57 for all major headings and brand-related labels.
2. Stick to a 'Pitch Black' (#000000) background for true OLED depth.
3. Components must have a high corner radius (24px-28px) to match the hardware curvature.
4. Use a Bento Grid layout for dashboard and content organization.
5. Implement subtle 'dot' patterns in backgrounds or as data points in charts.
6. Keep the interface extremely clean; if an element isn't necessary, remove it.
7. Use the signature Nothing Red (#D71921) as a single-point accent color.
8. Animations should be snappy and mimic physical switches or mechanical movements.
